label: Create Activity Log
description: Log an activity in OKRunit for audit and tracking purposes. This does not create an approval request — the scenario continues immediately.

parameters.name: title
parameters.label: Title
parameters.help: Short title for the activity log entry (max 500 characters). Use dynamic data from previous modules.

parameters.name: description
parameters.label: Description
parameters.help: Detailed description (max 5000 characters). Use dynamic data from previous modules.

parameters.name: source_url
parameters.label: Scenario URL
parameters.help: Link back to this Make scenario so team members can jump to it from OKRunit. Use the built-in system variable {{scenarioUrl}} to auto-populate.

parameters.name: metadata
parameters.label: Metadata (JSON)
parameters.help: Optional JSON data to attach (e.g. {"order_id": "123"}). This data is stored with the log entry for reference.

samples.title: Invoice #1234 sent to client
samples.description: Auto-sent via Make scenario after payment confirmed
